message:
fix(c-api): extend catch_unwind panic safety to sqlite3_open and sqlite3_prepare_v2

Continue the FFI panic safety initiative started in the previous commit
by wrapping sqlite3_open and sqlite3_prepare_v2 in catch_unwind:

sqlite3_open:
- Wrap Connection::open() call in catch_unwind with AssertUnwindSafe
- On panic, set *pp_db to null and return SQLITE_ERROR with a log message
  identifying the panicking path

sqlite3_prepare_v2:
- Wrap validate_and_classify_prepared_sql() in catch_unwind
- On panic, return SQLITE_ERROR rather than allowing undefined behavior
  at the FFI boundary

This ensures all major C API entry points are panic-safe, preventing
Rust panics from crossing into C caller code which would be undefined
behavior per the Rust reference.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
